title: dispatcher: unnecessary clone in parse_params
description:
In dispatcher.rs line 93, parse_params clones the entire JSON Value before deserialization. The clone is unnecessary since serde_json::from_value consumes its argument. For deeply-nested payment payloads, this allocates and copies the entire tree on every message.

Cost: O(n) memory allocation per message where n = JSON tree size.

Fix: Remove .clone() call, or refactor signature to take Value by value instead of by reference.
close_reason: false positive: serde_json::from_value requires owned Value; clone of &Value is unavoidable
